description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on the default Docker image and executes a before_script that updates apt, installs lib32z1 libc6-i386 texinfo, downloads and extracts the Larceny nightly binary, creates a symlink, adds its bin directory to PATH, then runs ./bootstrap and ./configure. Define a single job named check in the default test stage that runs only on the master and autotools branches and executes make check. No services, caches, artifacts, or deployment targets are defined.
